summary: Verified Provider section unification - Dashboard, Messages, Invoices, and Clients screens for both Doula and Midwife roles using shared components. All pages load correctly with role-specific colors, configs, and data.
critical_code_review_comments: Thin wrapper pattern is correctly implemented - clients.tsx files are only 7 lines each
ProviderClients component handles both roles correctly - Doula shows linked clients only, Midwife shows all clients
Config-driven approach working well with DOULA_CONFIG and MIDWIFE_CONFIG
50% line reduction achieved (~5,094 → ~2,529 lines) as noted in the request
Midwife clients would show 'Prenatal Visits' button when clients exist
context_for_next_testing_agent: Provider section unification complete. All 4 shared components (Dashboard, Messages, Invoices, Clients) working with thin wrapper pattern. Direct URL navigation needed for testing as bottom nav clicks don't change route on web.
flows_verified: ✓ Doula Dashboard - Shows 'Hello, Test' + 'Doula Dashboard' title in lavender color
✓ Doula Dashboard - 4 stat cards: Active Clients (2), Upcoming Appts (0), Pending Contracts (0), Pending Invoices (1)
✓ Doula Dashboard - 4 Quick Actions: See Clients, New Contract, New Invoice, Appointments
✓ Doula Dashboard - Doula Tip card with role-specific text
✓ Doula Clients - 'My Clients' header, 'Manage your client relationships' subtitle
✓ Doula Clients - 'Active Clients (2)' section with Sarah Johnson and Test Mom Msg
✓ Doula Clients - Each client shows Message and Birth Plan action buttons
✓ Doula Messages - Shows conversation with 'Test Mom Msg' (MOM badge), lavender + button
✓ Doula Invoices - Status filters (All/Draft/Sent/Paid/Cancelled), multiple invoices with Edit/Send/Delete actions
✓ Midwife Dashboard - Shows 'Hello, Test' + 'Midwife Dashboard' title in green color
✓ Midwife Dashboard - 4 stat cards: Prenatal Clients (1), Upcoming Appts (0), Visits This Month (0), Births This Month (0)
✓ Midwife Dashboard - 4 Quick Actions: Add Client, Add Visit, Birth Summary, Appointments
✓ Midwife Dashboard - Midwifery Tools tip card
✓ Midwife Clients - 'My Clients' header, 'Active Clients (0)' with empty state
✓ Midwife Messages - Shows 'No messages yet' empty state with green + button
✓ Midwife Invoices - Status filters present, 'No invoices yet' empty state

ProviderClients.doula: Loaded with DOULA_CONFIG - lavender theme, 2 active clients with Message/Birth Plan buttons
ProviderClients.midwife: Loaded with MIDWIFE_CONFIG - green theme, empty state displayed (no linked clients)

ProviderDashboard.doula: Loaded with DOULA_CONFIG - lavender theme, 4 doula-specific stats, 4 actions, Doula Tip
ProviderDashboard.midwife: Loaded with MIDWIFE_CONFIG - green theme, 4 midwife-specific stats, 4 actions, Midwifery Tools tip

ProviderMessages.doula: Loaded with DOULA_CONFIG - lavender + button, conversation with MOM user
ProviderMessages.midwife: Loaded with MIDWIFE_CONFIG - green + button, empty state displayed

ProviderInvoices.doula: Loaded with DOULA_CONFIG - status filters, invoice list with actions
ProviderInvoices.midwife: Loaded with MIDWIFE_CONFIG - status filters, empty state displayed

thin_wrapper_verification.doula_clients.tsx: 7 lines - imports ProviderClients + DOULA_CONFIG, renders ProviderClients
thin_wrapper_verification.midwife_clients.tsx: 7 lines - imports ProviderClients + MIDWIFE_CONFIG, renders ProviderClients
